summary: Full-stack software engineer with production experience building, debugging, and evaluating AI agents end-to-end across backend, frontend, and infrastructure using Python, TypeScript, and React. Shipped a multi-agent conversational AI platform, a production RAG service with automated evaluation pipelines, and a computer vision system on Kubernetes. Comfortable owning features from design through launch and iteration, balancing speed with quality and maintainability while taking accountability for AI system behavior.

skills.ml: LLMs (Claude, GPT-4o), Agentic AI, LangChain, RAG, Vector Embeddings, Prompt Engineering, Model Evaluation, HuggingFace, XGBoost
skills.infra: PostgreSQL, Kubernetes, Docker, REST APIs, FastAPI, Express.js, Node.js, GitHub Actions CI/CD, AWS, GCP, Supabase

experience.title: Deep Learning Intern
bullets: Developed a YOLO-based object detection model in Python to detect and classify industrial pipe inventory from warehouse images, improving accuracy by 30% and eliminating a fully manual counting process.
Containerized the model with Docker and deployed on Kubernetes for horizontal scaling of model inference, enabling the team to handle variable load without code changes.

Built a data augmentation pipeline using NumPy and Pandas, scaling the training dataset from a few hundred to 10,000+ images and manually re-annotating 500+ edge cases; accuracy improved from 65% to 85.4% on held-out evaluation data.
Designed normalized relational database schemas in SQL (PostgreSQL-compatible) to store image metadata and inference results, enabling cross-team queries on model performance and inventory trends.

projects.name: AI Interview Engine
projects.subtitle: Voice-First Candidate Screening Platform
projects.stack: Next.js, Express, Claude Sonnet/Haiku, Deepgram, Supabase, Railway, Vercel
bullets: Owned an agentic conversational AI platform end-to-end, from React/Next.js frontend through Express backend to Supabase (PostgreSQL) data layer, designing a multi-turn agent with dynamic context injection that generates targeted, role-specific follow-up questions in real time.

Engineered a real-time voice pipeline integrating Deepgram Nova-2 (speech-to-text) and Aura (text-to-speech) with Claude Sonnet 4.6, achieving 4-5s end-to-end latency per conversational turn and replacing human interviewers for initial candidate screening.

Built an automated document ingestion pipeline (PDF parsing, Claude Haiku, MD5 deduplication caching) and a post-interview agent evaluation system scoring candidates across 4 dimensions with advance/hold/reject output; deployed full-stack on Railway, Vercel, and Supabase (PostgreSQL with Row-Level Security and Magic Link authentication) with Brevo SMTP for transactional email automation.

projects.name: CodeSyntax AI
projects.subtitle: Full-Stack RAG Developer Assistant
projects.stack: Python, FastAPI, Next.js, LangChain, Pinecone, Docker, GitHub Actions
bullets: Built a production retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) agent using GPT-4o-mini with semantic search over Python Docs, RealPython, and StackOverflow, indexed in Pinecone via OpenAI vector embeddings, exposed through a React/Next.js frontend.

Implemented an LLM-based query intent classifier and result re-ranker by source authority using LangChain, plus multi-turn conversation support via chat-history condensing, both measurably reducing off-topic responses.

Built a 55-question domain evaluation set and 35+ pytest unit tests to debug and evaluate agent behavior; GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline builds the Docker image and deploys to Railway (API) and Vercel (frontend) on every merge to main.

projects.name: AuthentiText
projects.subtitle: AI-Generated Text Detection Engine
projects.stack: Python, XGBoost, DistilBERT, HuggingFace, GCP, Docker
bullets: Trained a weighted ensemble model combining XGBoost (21 hand-crafted linguistic features: perplexity, burstiness, lexical density) with a fine-tuned DistilBERT transformer, achieving 99.1% F1 and 99.96% AUROC on held-out test data.

Conducted systematic model comparison across four architectures (Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost, DistilBERT) using ROC curves, confusion matrices, and SHAP feature importance; integrated Captum token-level attribution heatmaps for explainable AI.
Trained on the merged HC3 corpus spanning Wikipedia, Reddit, medicine, and finance domains; deployed as a publicly accessible machine learning inference app on HuggingFace Spaces.
